name: Raspberry Poppy Seed Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 300 degrees. Beat powdered sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add vanilla and egg. Blend well. Stir in flour, poppy seeds, and salt. Mix well. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Make an indentation in the center of each with a finger. Fill each indentation with about 1/2 teaspoon of preserves. Bake until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes. Remove from cookie sheets immediately.
